name: Halo-Halo
description: A colorful Filipino classic made with shaved ice, sweet beans, jellies, fruits, leche flan, and creamy ube ice cream.

name: Mango Graham
description: Layers of sweet ripe mangoes, crushed graham crackers, and creamy milk blended into a rich and refreshing dessert drink.

name: Mango Shake
description: A smooth and icy tropical drink made with fresh ripe mangoes for the perfect balance of sweetness and freshness.

name: Sago't Gulaman
description: A refreshing brown sugar drink with chewy tapioca pearls and soft gulaman jelly, served ice cold.

name: Taho
description: Silky soft tofu topped with arnibal syrup and sago pearls, a comforting Filipino favorite served warm or chilled.
